final:
module aes_add_round_key (
    input wire [127:0] plaintext,
    input wire [127:0] round_key,
    output reg [127:0] ciphertext
);
    always @(*) begin
        ciphertext = plaintext ^ round_key; // XOR operation
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      ciphertext <= plaintext & round_key;
    end
  end

endmodule
